question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6825 and 6849.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: Based on current data, <cite index="3-1,15-2">the S&P 500 is trading at 6,785.74 as of April 9, 2026</cite>, which is below the target range of 6825-6849.9999. <cite index="2-1,11-1">The index rose to 6783 points on April 8, 2026, gaining 2.52% from the previous session</cite> due to ceasefire optimism in the Middle East conflict. However, <cite index="7-1,7-13">the index is currently hovering around 6,582 according to technical analysis, and market participants are closely monitoring whether this level represents a durable floor</cite>. The S&P 500 would need to rise approximately 0.6-1.0% overnight to reach the target range, which is possible but unlikely given current volatility and geopolitical uncertainty.
